notes: Observational autonomy. Chorus is the bed; 'This is the most autonomous I will ever feel' is the thesis. 'Good thing I'm not—' trails off; the unspoken word IS the joke. AUDITED 2026-04-20: chorus + opening utterance demoted to ribbons so the two deliberate held moments (punchline trail-off, final destination outro) can land as true keys. The final thesis gets a key; the first thesis stays ribbon so the escalation reads.

chunks.note: Your driver is... no one — uncanny opening, mixed ribbon
Waymo, Waymo, take me home — first chorus pt1, ribbon
no one at the wheel — mixed ribbon
most autonomous I will ever feel — thesis #1, ribbon (final is the key)
Good thing I'm not driving #1 — ribbon
Good thing I'm not — trailed-off punchline, unspoken word is the joke. KEY.
This is the most autonomous I will ever feel — final thesis, KEY
You have arrived at your destination — 3.16s hold, the AI dissolving. KEY.
